patch_notes: Unified detector output naming to *_Match to align with weighting multipliers
Added high-ROI tag overrides (Justification, Atonement, Trinity)

detectors.Verse_Citation_Match: Boolean per segment/quote unit. True if chapter/verse patterns detected (e.g., Romans 8:1, John 3, 'Romans chapter 8').
detectors.Personal_Anecdote_Match: Boolean per segment/quote unit. True if first-person narrative markers detected (e.g., 'when I was', 'I remember', 'my friend').
detectors.Imperative_Language_Match: Boolean per segment/quote unit. True if command/imperative language detected (e.g., 'you must', 'repent', 'forgive', 'go').
detectors.Global_Divergence_Match: Boolean per segment/quote unit. True if non-Western/global context markers detected (geography/mission context/languages/cultural frames).

disambiguation_rules.authority_term_handling: Never count plain 'authority' into multiple layers. If nearby tokens indicate church governance (pastor/elders/church/submit/leadership) map to 'Governance Authority'. If nearby tokens indicate truth/Scripture/Word/doctrine map to 'Epistemic Authority'. If ambiguous, map to none unless explicitly qualified.
